text: To convert radians to degrees, we multiply the radian measure by 180 over pi.
Part (i): Converting 5 pi over 3 radians. Multiplying by 180 over pi, pi cancels out, giving 300 degrees.
Part (ii): Converting 13 pi over 4 radians. Multiplying by 180 over pi simplifies to 585 degrees.
Part (iii): Converting minus 24 pi over 5 radians. Multiplying by 180 over pi yields minus 864 degrees.
